root.title: Implement GitHub PR creation with structured intention tree output
root.reasoning: Complete the workflow by automatically creating GitHub PRs with rich intention tree descriptions and generating .ivc.json files to store structured intention data alongside code changes
uncertainties: Handling of various git remote URL formats
User preferences for draft vs regular PRs
assumptions: Users will set GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable
Git remote origin follows standard GitHub URL patterns
JSON format is sufficient for intention tree storage

sub_intentions.title: Add GitHub client integration with octocrab
sub_intentions.reasoning: Need reliable GitHub API integration to create pull requests programmatically with proper authentication and error handling
assumptions: octocrab provides sufficient GitHub API coverage
Personal access tokens are preferred over OAuth

sub_intentions.title: Generate structured .ivc.json files from intention trees
sub_intentions.reasoning: Provide machine-readable intention data that can be consumed by other tools, IDEs, or CI/CD pipelines for documentation and analysis
assumptions: File should be committed to version control

sub_intentions.title: Format intention trees as rich markdown PR descriptions
sub_intentions.reasoning: Transform structured intention data into human-readable PR descriptions that help reviewers understand the purpose and context of code changes
uncertainties: How much detail to include in descriptions
assumptions: GitHub supports the markdown features used
Reviewers prefer structured over free-form descriptions
depends_on: Generate structured .ivc.json files from intention trees

sub_intentions.title: Extend CLI with GitHub workflow options and configuration
sub_intentions.reasoning: Provide users control over the PR creation process with flags for drafts, pushing, and GitHub integration while maintaining backward compatibility
assumptions: Users want fine-grained control over automation
Configuration should be optional with sensible defaults
depends_on: Add GitHub client integration with octocrab

sub_intentions.title: Add git remote parsing for GitHub repository detection
sub_intentions.reasoning: Automatically detect GitHub owner/repo from git remotes to reduce configuration burden and support common repository URL formats
uncertainties: Coverage of all possible git remote URL formats
assumptions: Standard GitHub URL patterns are used

sub_intentions.title: Expand database schema for external source tracking
sub_intentions.reasoning: Prepare data model for future integration with ticket systems and external requirements by adding source tracking tables
assumptions: External source integration will be needed
Coverage tracking will be valuable for analysis
